notes: Realized PnL since reset is not positive: -229.3950.

modified_or_rejected_principles.idea: apply identical fee math to yes and no with no_bid for NO entry
modified_or_rejected_principles.reason: NO entry must be evaluated off executable no_ask, not no_bid
replace with model-relative deterioration + hysteresis, not permanent disable

modified_or_rejected_principles.idea: lower thresholds before measuring side/regime outcomes
modified_or_rejected_principles.reason: thresholds come after calibrated replay, not before

crypto_lag.last_signal_reason: BTC bucket fair YES 0.020; exec_yes=-0.005 exec_no=-0.035; spot=$67,252 low=69500.0 high=69999.99 hours=0.05

exit_policy.entry_side_truth: best executable side persisted into shadow_trades/shadow_positions
exit_policy.mark_truth: yes_bid for YES / no_bid for NO

post_exit_v2_cohorts.note: pre/post cohorts split so consultant reviews do not mix legacy exits with new exit-v2 behavior

phases.name: Runtime health and snapshot invariants
phases.goal: Restore stable /api/status, stable dashboard loop, snapshot shape invariants, and JSON-safe responses.
done_definition: market_snapshots is always a dict keyed by ticker
snapshot objects expose downstream-required fields like spot_symbol
dashboard_status returns JSON-safe payloads with no raw datetime leaks
loop_error is null across repeated checks

phases.name: Expiry-cluster inventory skew control
phases.goal: Add Hummingbot/Avellaneda-style inventory controller across correlated BTC buckets for the same expiry.
done_definition: cluster inventory state visible in debug surfaces
candidate rows show inventory penalty / side suppression / quote-size multiplier
replay can compare pre- and post-inventory-adjusted maker/taker expectancy

phases.name: Maker quoting + LIP rebate replay simulation
phases.goal: Simulate maker economics as spread capture + queue realism + toxicity + Kalshi LIP rebate.
done_definition: replay compares taker expectancy vs maker ex-rebate vs maker inc-rebate
quote distance / queue / partial-fill / rebate estimates stored in cohort rows

phases.name: Queue, imbalance, and toxic-fill telemetry
phases.goal: Add markouts, queue-ahead proxy, imbalance, and maker shield telemetry.

phases.name: Ensemble fair-value layer
phases.goal: Upgrade from single-model fair value to ensemble replay calibration.

phases.name: Projected-settlement / final-minute replay logic
phases.goal: Model final-minute settlement/index behavior in replay.

next_patch_after_p0: Implement expiry-cluster inventory state and scenario payout surface
Add maker rebate estimator fields and debug route
Keep all of it replay-only until evidence matures

assumptions.toxic_fill_1s_rule: spread/imbalance/spot_move heuristic until true markout history is wired

exit_policy.entry_side_truth: best executable side persisted into shadow_trades/shadow_positions
exit_policy.mark_truth: yes_bid for YES / no_bid for NO

post_exit_v2_cohorts.note: pre/post cohorts split so consultant reviews do not mix legacy exits with new exit-v2 behavior

architect_decisions: accept synthetic_BRTI_proxy and surface it everywhere
accept regime filter but keep it advisory until replay proves edge by regime
accept fat-tail adjustment as overlay diagnostics first, not live pricing replacement yet
accept maker path as maker-readiness and replay path first, not live quoting yet

historical_lookup.note: Fallback uses resolved market_opportunities best_side outcomes as a taker-style empirical replay proxy until execution_compare cohorts have resolved rows.
